insert.data_setvariableto: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_setvariableto"><field name="VARIABLE" variabletype="">my variable</field><value name="VALUE"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">0</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_changevariableby: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_changevariableby"><field name="VARIABLE" variabletype="">my variable</field><value name="VALUE"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_addtolist: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_addtolist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="ITEM"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">thing</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_deleteoflist: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_deleteoflist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="INDEX"><shadow type="math_integer"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_insertatlist: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_insertatlist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="ITEM"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">thing</field></shadow></value><value name="INDEX"><shadow type="math_integer"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_replaceitemoflist: <block blockType="Stack" type="data_replaceitemoflist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="INDEX"><shadow type="math_integer"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value><value name="ITEM"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">thing</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_itemoflist: <block blockType="Reporter" type="data_itemoflist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="INDEX"><shadow type="math_integer"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_itemnumoflist: <block blockType="Reporter" type="data_itemnumoflist"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="ITEM"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">thing</field></shadow></value></block>
insert.data_listcontainsitem: <block blockType="Boolean" type="data_listcontainsitem"><field name="LIST" variabletype="list">my list</field><value name="ITEM"><shadow type="text"><field name="TEXT">thing</field></shadow></value></block>
